overall.description: A nighttime scene from a video game showing two characters and a horse walking through open grassland toward a large rock formation, illuminated by a lantern. The group crosses railway tracks as they journey through the wilderness under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant rock formation and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open grassland at night while leading a horse with a lantern, accompanied by a companion

notable_agents.action: companion walking alongside the horse to the left
horse being led by the character carrying the lantern

entered.detail: tall rocky mountain peak silhouetted against the cloudy night sky
cluster of dark trees on the left horizon
cluster of dark trees on the right horizon
wooden telegraph pole with multiple cross-arms and wires
metal railway tracks cutting across the dirt path ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, overcast night in open grassland. Two characters and a horse walk along a dirt trail, with one character holding a lantern that casts a warm glow on the path. In the distance, a large rock formation looms against the sky, while scattered trees dot the horizon. A utility pole and railway tracks become visible as the group approaches them.

scene_state.functional_zone: railway crossing with approaching rock formation

events.description: crossing the railway tracks, transitioning from grass to metal rails and back to grass

agents.ego_description: carefully crossing the railway tracks while maintaining pace with the horse and companion

notable_agents.action: companion maintaining pace while crossing the tracks
horse stepping over the railway tracks

entered.detail: large rock outcrop on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The group reaches and crosses the railway tracks, with the lantern light illuminating the metal rails. After crossing, they continue toward the large rock formation which now appears closer and more prominent. A large boulder becomes visible on the right side of the path as the utility pole and tracks fall behind. The terrain remains open grassland with scattered trees drawing nearer on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, overcast grassland as a small group journeys toward a looming rock formation. It begins on a dirt trail where two characters and a horse walk under the warm, flickering glow of a handheld lantern. As the group advances, the camera tracks them toward a utility pole and a set of railway tracks that cut across the open terrain. The scene then shifts as they cross the metal rails, leaving the tracks behind while the distant rock formation grows more prominent and imposing against the night sky. Finally, the path opens further, passing a large boulder on the right and drawing closer to scattered trees on the left as the destination nears.
